IDENTITY: Candidate Profile (26746496.pdf)
SUMMARY: Software Engineer with 2 years in Web Developer specializing in front end development. Proficient in SDLC and Agile methodologies to produce software solutions by team. Involved in designing, planning, developing and implementing Microsoft .Net based solutions that meet quality and code standards using C#, ASP.Net, ASP.Net MVC, JavaScript, jQuery, CSS, Bootstrap CSS, HTML, XML and AJAX.
SKILLS: C#, Java, VB.Net, C, .Net Framework (4.0/4.5), ASP.Net, ASP.NET MVC, ADO.Net, Entity Framework, AJAX, Web Services, LINQ, HTML, CSS, JavaScript, jQuery, Bootstrap CSS
